prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类/理科最低位次约 4927→4804→5008→7525→5503，2024 年因新高考改革位次大幅后移至 7525，2025 年显著回升至 5503，近两年波动较大；2025 年基准约 5503 名；本省物理类计划 2021 年 200 人、2022 年 195 人、2023 年 197 人、2024 年 198 人、2025 年 192 人；2026 年计划 238 人，较 2025 年扩招约 24%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 27 名，近年排名稳定在第 23–27 名区间，属于国内顶尖高校行列；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（原校长张尧学被查事件），2024–2025 年亦出现投档断档信号；抖音综合热度排名第 85（一般），短视频曝光量偏低；历史投档异常记录（2024 年中关注、2025 年低关注）可能对报考心理产生一定抑制；冶金工程 A+、护理学 A+、材料科学与工程 A、临床医学 A-、计算机科学与技术 A-、交通运输工程 A- 等 13 个 A- 及以上学科，学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏热；土木建筑类分化观望；生 化环材类一般观望至明显劝退。本省 2026 年普通高考考生总数约 299000 人，较 2025 年（历史类 90087+物理类 207171≈297258）略有增加，竞争略加剧；中南大学位于湖南长沙，与贵州相邻，地域偏好较强；该校在贵州招生规模较大（物 理类 200 人左右），属省外重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 5503、2026 年大幅扩招约 24%（缓解竞争）、本省考生总数小幅增加（加剧竞争）、声誉偏负面（抑制热度）等多重因素，再结合扩招缓解效应略作下调修正；预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 6264 名，区间 5764–6764 名。扩招是推动位次后移（数字增大）的最关键因素，而考生增加和声誉负面则部分抵消了扩招的缓解效果。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics/Science category was approximately 4927→4804→5008→7525→5503. In 2024, due to the new college entrance exam reform, the ranking significantly dropped to 7525, but rebounded to 5503 in 2025, showing large fluctuations in recent two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 5503. The provincial Physics category enrollment plan was 200 in 2021, 195 in 2022, 197 in 2023, 198 in 2024, and 192 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 238, an increase of about 24% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and may alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 27th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in the 23–27 range in recent years, belonging to the top domestic universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (due to the investigation of former president Zhang Yaoxue), and there were signs of enrollment gaps in 2024–2025. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 85 (average), with relatively low short video exposure. Historical enrollment anomalies (medium attention in 2024, low attention in 2025) may suppress application psychology to some extent. With A+ in Metallurgical Engineering, A+ in Nursing, A in Materials Science and Engineering, A- in Clinical Medicine, A- in Computer Science and Technology, A- in Transportation Engineering, and 13 disciplines rated A- or above, the university has strong academic strength, attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular in society. Civil Engineering and Architecture are in a wait-and-see phase. Biology, Chemistry, Environmental Science, and Materials Science are generally viewed with caution or even discouraged. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province is about 299,000, a slight increase from 2025 (Liberal Arts 90,087 + Physics 207,171 ≈ 297,258), intensifying competition slightly. Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, adjacent to Guizhou, with strong regional preference. The university has a large enrollment scale in Guizhou (about 200 in Physics category), making it a key out-of-province source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5503, the significant 24% enrollment expansion in 2026 (alleviating competition), the slight increase in provincial examinee numbers (intensifying competition), and the negative reputation (suppressing popularity), combined with a slight downward adjustment due to the expansion effect, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics category in 2026 is approximately 6264, with a range of 5764–6764. The expansion is the most critical factor pushing the ranking backward (numerical increase), while the increase in examinees and negative reputation partially offset the alleviating effect of the expansion.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 6264, range 5764–6764. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Category, Automation Category, Mathematics Category, etc.) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Stomatology, Computer Top Talent Base Class) as reach targets. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<5764), focus on Tier 1 flagship majors. For rankings near the upper limit (>6764), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 631→663→602→1007→1133. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking shifted backward to 1007, and in 2025 it further shifted to 1133, showing a continuous backward trend in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1133. The provincial history category enrollment plan was 18 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 26 in 2025, and is planned to be 32 in 2026, an expansion of about 23% compared to 2025, which significantly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 27th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the 23–27 range in recent years, belonging to the top domestic universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (due to the investigation of former president Zhang Yaoxue), and there were also signs of enrollment gaps in 2024–2025. The comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 85th (average), with relatively low short video exposure. Historical abnormal enrollment records may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. The Marxist Theory discipline is rated A-, indicating strong liberal arts-related disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially popular (recommended), Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, and Foreign Languages and Literature is generally wait-and-see. The total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is about 299,000, a slight increase from 2025, intensifying competition slightly. Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, adjacent to Guizhou, with strong regional preference. The university's enrollment scale in Guizhou for history category is relatively small (about 20–30 students), making it a key source province outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1133, the significant enrollment expansion of about 23% in 2026 (alleviating competition), a slight increase in the total number of candidates in the province (intensifying competition), and a negative reputation (inhibiting popularity), combined with a slight downward adjustment due to the expansion effect, the predicted minimum ranking for the history category in 2026 is approximately 1270, with a range of 1089–1451. The enrollment expansion is the most critical factor driving the ranking backward (numerical increase), and the continuous backward trend in recent years also supports this direction.
